nits: fetchHistoryPaginated: if Gmail ever omits historyId from the response, latestHistoryId stays at startHistoryId and emitted messages would be re-emitted on the next poll — consider tracking max historyId seen across pages, but in practice Gmail always returns it
isHistoryTooOld treats ANY HTTP 404 as history-too-old, including 404s from LIST_HISTORY for unrelated reasons (rare); the fallback (re-baseline + LIST_THREADS last hour) is benign so impact is small

LIST_THREADS fallback uses a 1h window; if the previous successful poll was >1h ago (cron backlog, long outage) some messages in the gap will be missed — documented inline as intentional anti-spam tradeoff

from-filter does substring match on lowercased header — `from: ['alice@example.com']` would also match `malice@example.com`; consider anchoring to angle-brackets or exact email parse, but spec only asks for filter to work
labelIds filter is passed as `label_id` (single) — multiple label_ids in trigger_config silently drop all but the first; ok per Gmail API but worth a comment
reviewer: opus-4.7 adversarial pass via Agent tool
